fixes.title: Inline the value if it is a constant (e.g., 'items.all(p => p.qty > 10)' instead of capturing 'threshold')
Use 'fold' with the value threaded through the accumulator (e.g., 'items.fold(threshold, (acc, p) => ...)')
Refactor the lambda body to not depend on external state

message: lambda cannot reference 'threshold' from the enclosing function; lambdas may only use their own parameters and top-level functions
